sourceSummary.oneLine: SGS Korea test report for KS liquid type materials covering RoHS-related heavy metals, PBBs/PBDEs, and phthalates.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Use as supplier or material compliance evidence for tested sample AYAA19-07026.001, with results limited to the submitted sample.
keyPoints: Issued Date: 2019. 01. 29; Test Report No. F690101/LF-CTSAYAA19-07026.
Client identified as SAMSUNG HUETONE CO., LTD.; product name KS; item/part number N/A.
Cadmium, lead, mercury, hexavalent chromium, PBBs/PBDEs, and phthalates are reported as N.D. for the tested sample.
Test methods reference IEC 62321 series standards.
The report states that results refer only to the sample unless otherwise stated.

concepts.name: RoHS heavy metals testing
concepts.evidence: Testing Flow Chart for RoHS:Cd/Pb/Hg/Cr6+ /PBBs&PBDEs Testing

concepts.name: Cadmium by ICP-OES
concepts.evidence: With reference to IEC 62321-5:2013 (Determination of Cadmium by ICP-OES)

concepts.name: Lead by ICP-OES
concepts.evidence: With reference to IEC 62321-5:2013 (Determination of Lead by ICP-OES)

concepts.name: Mercury by ICP-OES
concepts.evidence: With reference to IEC 62321-4:2013 (Determination of Mercury by ICP-OES)

concepts.name: Hexavalent Chromium by UV-Vis colorimetric method
concepts.evidence: With reference to IEC 62321-7-2:2017, determination of Hexavalent Chromium by Colorimetric Method using UV-Vis

concepts.name: PBBs and PBDEs by GC-MS
concepts.evidence: With reference to IEC 62321-6:2015 (Determination of PBBs and PBDEs by GC-MS)

evidence.claim: The document is an SGS test report issued on 2019. 01. 29.
evidence.evidenceText: Issued Date : 2019. 01. 29 Test Report No. F690101/LF-CTSAYAA19-07026

evidence.claim: The submitted client was SAMSUNG HUETONE CO., LTD.
evidence.evidenceText: The following sample(s) was/were submitted and identified by/on behalf of the client as:- SAMSUNG HUETONE CO., LTD.

evidence.claim: The product name is KS and item/part number is N/A.
evidence.evidenceText: Product Name : KS Item No./Part No. : N/A

evidence.evidenceText: Sample No. : AYAA19-07026.001 KS Sample Description : Item No./Part No. : N/A Liquid type Materials :

evidence.claim: Cadmium, lead, mercury, and hexavalent chromium results were N.D. in mg/kg.
evidence.evidenceText: Cadmium (Cd) mg/kg N.D.; Lead (Pb) mg/kg N.D.; Mercury (Hg) mg/kg N.D.; Hexavalent Chromium (Cr VI)* N.D. mg/kg

evidence.claim: PBB and PBDE flame retardants were tested by reference to IEC 62321-6:2015 and reported N.D.
evidence.evidenceText: Flame Retardants-PBBs/PBDEs... With reference to IEC 62321-6:2015 (Determination of PBBs and PBDEs by GC-MS)... N.D. mg/kg

evidence.claim: DEHP, DBP, BBP, and DIBP phthalates were tested by reference to IEC 62321-8:2017 GC/MS and reported N.D.
evidence.evidenceText: Phthalates... With reference to IEC 62321-8 ; 2017 , GC/MS Di-(2-ethylhexyl) phthalate (DEHP) N.D.; Di-butyl phthalate (DBP) N.D.; Benzyl butyl phthalate (BBP) N.D.; Di-isobutyl phthalate (DIBP) N.D.

evidence.claim: N.D. means not detected below the method detection limit.
The report results refer only to the tested samples unless otherwise stated.
evidence.evidenceText: Unless otherwise stated the results shown in this test report refer only to the sample(s).

reviewFlags.reason: No explicit regulatory authority or jurisdiction is stated; SGS Korea Co., Ltd. is identified as the issuing testing company, not a government authority.
Document title is inferred from the visible report number because no standalone title line is provided.
The test period line appears inconsistent or OCR-impaired: '2019. 01. 29 to 2019. 01. 23'.
